meta.title: Roof renewal – wash, impregnation & painting
meta.description: We renew Norwegian roofs with washing, impregnation and painting – or install a brand-new roof. Fixed price, free inspection and 10-year warranty.

hero.title: We give your roof
hero.subtitle: Maintenance or a new roof – we handle the full job from inspection to finished result.

services.title: Everything your roof needs
services.subtitle: From washing and moss removal to impregnation, painting and a new roof – fixed pricing and a clear plan.

inspection.title: Thorough roof inspection
inspection.description: Before we start, we check underlay, structure, ridge tape and flashings – so you know the roof is ready for renewal.

tiles.title: Replacement of damaged tiles
tiles.description: Broken or missing tiles are replaced as part of the job when you have matching tiles available.

wash.title: Roof washing & moss removal
wash.description: Gentle high-pressure washing that removes moss, algae and dirt without damaging the tiles.

impregnation.title: Tile impregnation
impregnation.description: After washing we protect the tiles with NowoCoat/Surfatech – against moisture and new moss for years.

paint.title: Tile painting
paint.description: Specialist coating in your chosen colour gives lasting protection and a roof that looks new.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & inspection
maintenance.description: Annual checks keep the roof in top condition – before small issues become expensive.

warranty.title: 10-year warranty
warranty.description: We stand behind colour retention and a weathertight roof for ten years – peace of mind built in.

newRoof.title: New roof
newRoof.description: Some roofs cannot be renewed. Then we install a brand-new roof at a competitive price.

softwash.title: Softwash
softwash.description: Low-pressure treatment from the ground with biodegradable soap. Moss and algae loosen gradually with natural rain.

calculator.title: See what you can save
calculator.subtitle: Compare an estimated price for roof renewal with installing a completely new roof.
calculator.cheaper: That is {percent}% cheaper with roof renewal
calculator.disclaimer: Estimate only. You get an exact quote after a free inspection. Applies to full renewal; maintenance is often lower priced.
calculator.cta: Get a free inspection and quote

newRoof.title: Is the roof too worn to renew?
newRoof.subtitle: We also install brand-new roofs – from strip-out to finished covering with solid insulation and ventilation.
newRoof.body: With years of experience and hundreds of projects, you can trust the job is done properly – at a competitive price.
newRoof.note: Free inspection: We visit your home, assess the condition and give a no-obligation quote – renewal or new roof.

references.title: Results you can see
references.subtitle: How we have renewed roofs for homes and housing associations across the country.

about.title: Your roof deserves the best
about.subtitle: Confidence, quality and a result that lasts for years.
about.p1: We specialise in roof renewal: washing, impregnation and painting – so the roof looks new without a full replacement when it is not needed.
about.p2: With dedicated teams across Southern and Central Norway, our own admin and close follow-up, you get one contact and zero worry – from inspection to finished work.
about.p3: Thousands of treated roofs are no accident. It is craftspeople who care, high-quality materials, and warranties that mean something.

products.title: Products we trust
products.subtitle: Market-leading solutions from NowoCoat and Surfatech – built for professional roof treatment in Scandinavia.
products.footer: Every product is made for lasting protection and a result you can rely on for years.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Price, impregnation, moss removal and renewal vs replacement – explained briefly.

contact.title: Book a free inspection
contact.subtitle: No-obligation inspection and quote. We usually reply within 24 hours.

form.name: Name
form.message: Describe what you need help with
form.success: Thank you! We will be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Try again or call us.
form.required: Please fill in all required fields
form.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters

footer.tagline: Specialists in roof renewal. We wash, impregnate and paint – or install a new roof.
footer.warrantyNote: Warranty terms apply as agreed. Contact us for full terms.
